# 🎨 Portfolio Layout Research
### Based on: Vishesh Patel & Michelle Chiu (WallOfPortfolios)

---

## 📸 Portfolio 1 — Vishesh Patel *(Primary Reference)*
**URL:** https://www.wallofportfolios.in/portfolios/vishesh-patel/  
**Role:** Product Designer · 5 Years Experience · India

---

### 🎨 Color Palette

| Element              | Color                          | Description                     |
|----------------------|--------------------------------|---------------------------------|
| Page Background      | `#EDE8E3` / `#F0EBE5`         | Warm cream/beige (off-white)    |
| Nav Background       | `#1A1A1A` (dark pill shape)   | Near-black pill-shaped navbar   |
| Headline Text        | `#1A1A1A`                     | Very dark charcoal/black        |
| Accent / Highlight   | `#E05C2A` / `#D95C26`         | Warm orange-red (italic accent) |
| Button (Resume)      | `#E05C2A`                     | Orange-red pill button          |
| Nav Links            | `#FFFFFF`                     | White text on dark navbar       |
| Tag / Badge (WIP)    | `#F5F5F5`                     | Light grey pill badge           |
| Tag / Badge (Projects)| `#1A7FE8`                    | Blue pill badge                 |
| Photo border         | White border + slight shadow  | Polaroid-style stacked photos   |

> **Color Vibe:** Warm, earthy, creamy background with bold black typography and a strong orange-red accent. Very editorial and modern.

---

### ✏️ Typography

| Element              | Font Style                              | Notes                             |
|----------------------|-----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| Main Hero Headline   | Large Serif / Display font             | Very large, bold, weight 700-800  |
| Italic Accent Word   | Italic Display Serif (like Playfair)   | "Product designer" in italic red  |
| Nav Brand Name       | Monospace / Sans-serif lowercase       | `visheshpatel` in custom style    |
| Nav Links            | Clean Sans-serif, weight 400-500       | `Work`, `About`, `Contact`        |
| Body / Subtitle      | Sans-serif, Regular weight             | `Hey there 🤌 I am Vishesh Patel` |
| Resume Button        | Sans-serif, Medium weight              | Download icon + "Resume"          |

**Recommended Google Fonts to Replicate:**
- **Headlines:** `Playfair Display` (for the serif display look)
- **Body + Nav:** `Inter` or `DM Sans` (clean sans-serif)
- **Brand name:** `Space Mono` or `JetBrains Mono` (for the monospace feel)

---

### 📐 Layout Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [DARK PILL NAVBAR]                                          │
│  🧑 visheshpatel    Work  About  Contact   [Resume ▶]       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                             │
│   Hey there 🤌  I am Vishesh Patel                         │
│                                                             │
│   A  *Product designer*  turning product                   │  ← HERO SECTION
│   complexity into simple experiences.                      │
│                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                             │
│   [WIP 🏷]      [Between Projects 🏷]                       │
│   ┌───────┐  ┌───────┐  ┌───────┐                          │  ← STACKED PHOTO CLUSTER
│   │ photo │  │ photo │  │ photo │ (fanned/rotated)         │
│   └───────┘  └───────┘  └───────┘                          │
│                                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                             │
│   🕵🏻‍♂️ Sneak peak of my works                               │  ← WORK PREVIEW TEASER
│   [project cards below...]                                  │
│                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

### 🧩 Key UI Components

#### 1. Navbar — Dark Pill Shape
- Floating navbar, dark background (`#1A1A1A`), fully rounded corners (pill)
- Profile avatar circle on the left with profile image
- Nav links: Work, About, Contact
- CTA button: `⬇ Resume` in orange-red pill button on the right
- Does NOT span full width — it's a centered floating container

#### 2. Hero Section
- Left-aligned or center-aligned massive typography
- Two-line headline with serif italic accent on a keyword
- No hero image — pure typography-driven
- Subtle greeting line above the headline (`Hey there 🤌 I am Vishesh Patel`)

#### 3. Photo Cluster (Between Projects)
- 3 photos fanned out in a stack (rotated randomly, like polaroids)
- Floating badge tags above: `Between Projects` (blue pill), `WIP` (grey pill)
- Very playful, organic layout — not a grid

#### 4. Section Teaser
- A small avatar/sticker peeking from the edge (`🕵🏻‍♂️`)
- Text: "Sneak peak of my works"
- Leads into project cards below

---

### 📏 Spacing & Grid

- Max content width: ~`900px–1000px` centered
- Section padding: `80px–120px` vertical
- Photo cluster is organic — NOT on a grid
- Typography scale: Hero headline ~`80px–100px` on desktop

---

### ✨ Animations & Micro-interactions

- Photos in cluster likely have subtle parallax or mouse-tilt hover effect
- Resume button has hover glow/color shift
- Pill badges float above photos with slight movement
- Smooth scroll between sections

---

## 📸 Portfolio 2 — Michelle Chiu *(Secondary Reference)*
**URL:** https://www.wallofportfolios.in/portfolios/michelle-chiu/  
**Role:** Senior Product Designer · 7 Years Experience · United States

---

### 🎨 Color Palette

| Element              | Color                          | Description                     |
|----------------------|--------------------------------|---------------------------------|
| Page Background      | `#FFFFFF`                     | Pure white                      |
| Headline Text        | `#1A1A1A`                     | Dark charcoal/black             |
| Body Text            | `#333333` / `#555555`         | Dark grey paragraphs            |
| Link Color           | `#0066CC` or default blue     | Standard hyperlinks             |
| Project Title        | `#000000`                     | Bold black headings             |
| Skills Tags          | Plain text list, no pills     | Just comma-separated text       |
| Company logos        | Inline colored logos          | PayPal, Coinbase, Meta icons    |

> **Color Vibe:** Clean white, highly professional, editorial. Almost zero decorative color. Content-heavy, text-forward design. The images carry all the visual interest.

---

### ✏️ Typography

| Element              | Font Style                              | Notes                              |
|----------------------|-----------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Main Headline        | Large Sans-serif Bold                  | `Hi, I'm Michelle Chiu` — very big |
| Bio Paragraph        | Regular weight Sans-serif              | Dense, small text paragraphs      |
| Project Title        | Bold, large, slightly Display-like     | `PayPal`, `Gensmo (NDA)` etc.     |
| Skills List          | Regular sans-serif, small             | Listed as plain text               |
| Awards List          | Regular sans-serif, underlined links  | Linked text list                   |

**Recommended Google Fonts:**
- **Headlines:** `Inter` Bold (700) or `Syne`
- **Body:** `Inter` Regular (400)

---

### 📐 Layout Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  LEFT SIDEBAR (fixed/sticky, 260px wide)                    │
│  ┌──────────────────────┐                                   │
│  │ 🔵 Profile Avatar    │                                   │
│  │ Open to Work badge   │                                   │
│  │ Name: Michelle Chiu  │                                   │
│  │ @handle · Location   │                                   │
│  │ Role: Sr. Prod. Des. │                                   │
│  │ X Years Experience   │                                   │
│  │ [Company logos]      │                                   │
│  │ [Message] [Save]     │                                   │
│  │ ─────────────────    │                                   │
│  │ Profile              │                                   │
│  │ Portfolio            │                                   │
│  └──────────────────────┘                                   │
├──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  MAIN CONTENT    │  PROJECT IMAGES (right col)              │
│  (left ~45%)     │  (right ~55%)                            │
│                  │                                          │
│  Hi, I'm         │  ┌────┬────┐                             │
│  Michelle Chiu   │  │img │img │ PayPal project              │
│                  │  ├────┼────┤ photo grid                 │
│  [Bio text]      │  │img │img │                             │
│  [Links row]     │  └────┴────┘                             │
│                  │                                          │
│  [Skills list]   │  ─────────────                          │
│  [Awards list]   │                                          │
│                  │  ┌────┬────┐                             │
│  PayPal section  │  │img │img │ Next project                │
│  [description]   │  └────┴────┘                             │
│                  │                                          │
└──────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

### 🧩 Key UI Components

#### 1. Fixed Left Sidebar (WallOfPortfolios UI)
- Profile photo (circle, ~100px)
- "Open to Work" badge (blue icon + text)
- Name in bold, handle + location in grey
- Job title in bold
- Years of experience
- Company logo icons (PayPal, Coinbase, Meta etc.)
- Message + Save buttons

#### 2. Two-Column Content Layout
- Left: Bio text, links (Resume, LinkedIn, etc.), skills, awards, project descriptions
- Right: Project photos in a 2-column image grid
- Projects separated by a thin horizontal rule

#### 3. Project Cards (Not cards — inline sections)
- Project title as a large heading
- Company description paragraph
- Skills used as a plain text list
- 2×N photo grid on the right side for each project

#### 4. Sidebar Navigation
- "Profile" tab
- "Portfolio" tab
- Tab switching shows different content

---

### 📏 Spacing & Grid

- Sidebar: fixed ~`260px` wide
- Main content area: remaining width
- Two-column inside main: ~`45% text + 55% images`
- Line height: comfortable, ~`1.6–1.8` for body text
- Font size body: ~`14px–15px` (small, dense text)
- Project title: ~`28px–36px`

---
---

## 🏗️ How to Build YOUR Portfolio (Like Vishesh — Primary)

### Recommended Tech Stack
- **HTML + Vanilla CSS + Vanilla JS** (lightweight, fast)
- OR: **React + Vite** if you want component reuse

---

### Your Design Tokens (Copy Vishesh's Style)

```css
/* === COLORS === */
--bg-primary:    #EDE8E3;   /* Warm cream background */
--bg-dark:       #1A1A1A;   /* Navbar dark */
--text-primary:  #1A1A1A;   /* Main text */
--text-white:    #FFFFFF;   /* Nav text */
--accent:        #E05C2A;   /* Orange-red highlight */
--badge-blue:    #1A7FE8;   /* Blue pill badge */
--badge-grey:    #F0F0F0;   /* Grey pill badge */

/* === TYPOGRAPHY === */
--font-display:  'Playfair Display', serif;   /* Hero headline */
--font-body:     'Inter', sans-serif;         /* All other text */
--font-mono:     'Space Mono', monospace;     /* Brand name */

/* === SPACING === */
--section-pad:   100px 0;
--content-max:   960px;
--nav-pad:       16px 32px;
```

---

### Page Section Order (Vishesh Style)

```
1.  NAVBAR          — Dark floating pill with avatar, links, Resume CTA
2.  HERO            — Big serif headline with italic orange accent word
3.  PHOTO CLUSTER   — Stacked/rotated photos with floating pill badges
4.  WORK TEASER     — "Sneak peak" with peeking sticker/avatar
5.  PROJECTS        — Case study cards with large preview images
6.  ABOUT           — Short personal bio + skills
7.  CONTACT         — Simple contact section or CTA
```

---

### Navbar Blueprint

```
[🧑 Avatar]  [Name/Logo]  ─────────────  Work  About  Contact  [⬇ Resume]

Style:
- position: fixed, top: 20px, left: 50%, transform: translateX(-50%)
- background: #1A1A1A
- border-radius: 999px  (full pill)
- padding: 10px 20px
- box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
- z-index: 1000
```

---

### Hero Section Blueprint

```
position: relative
padding: 180px 0 100px   (extra top for fixed nav)
text-align: center  OR  left

Layout:
  <p>Hey there 🤌  I am [Your Name]</p>        ← Small greeting, sans-serif
  <h1>
    A <em>Your Role</em> turning [tagline].     ← Serif, italic accent in color
  </h1>

Font sizes:
  greeting:  18px, weight 400
  h1:        80px–100px, weight 700–800
  em (accent): italic, color: var(--accent)
```

---

### Photo Cluster Blueprint

```html
<div class="photo-cluster">
  <span class="badge blue">Between Projects</span>
  <span class="badge grey">WIP</span>
  <img class="photo photo-1" src="..." />  <!-- rotate: -8deg -->
  <img class="photo photo-2" src="..." />  <!-- rotate: 2deg  -->
  <img class="photo photo-3" src="..." />  <!-- rotate: 6deg  -->
</div>

CSS:
.photo-cluster { position: relative; width: 400px; height: 280px; }
.photo { position: absolute; border: 4px solid white; border-radius: 8px;
         box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
.photo-1 { transform: rotate(-8deg); left: 0; }
.photo-2 { transform: rotate(2deg); left: 120px; z-index: 2; }
.photo-3 { transform: rotate(6deg); left: 220px; }
.badge { position: absolute; top: -30px; padding: 6px 14px;
         border-radius: 999px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; }
.badge.blue { background: #1A7FE8; color: white; left: 60px; }
.badge.grey { background: #F0F0F0; color: #333; right: 60px; }
```

---

### Project Card Blueprint

```
Each project card:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Large preview image, rounded corners] │
│  Tag: UX Design  /  Case Study          │
│  Project Title (large, serif)           │
│  Short description (1-2 lines)          │
│  [View Case Study →]                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

CSS:
- border-radius: 16px
- overflow: hidden
- background: #F8F4F0 (slightly different from page bg)
- hover: scale(1.02), box-shadow increase
- transition: all 0.3s ease
```

---

## 🔑 Key Differences: Vishesh vs Michelle

| Feature              | Vishesh Patel              | Michelle Chiu               |
|----------------------|----------------------------|-----------------------------|
| **Background**       | Warm cream `#EDE8E3`       | Pure white `#FFFFFF`        |
| **Typography**       | Serif display headline     | Sans-serif only             |
| **Accent color**     | Orange-red `#E05C2A`       | Minimal (blue links only)   |
| **Layout**           | Full-width, centered       | Sidebar + main content      |
| **Tone**             | Playful, personality-rich  | Professional, content-heavy |
| **Photo usage**      | Polaroid cluster           | Grid of project screenshots |
| **Navigation**       | Floating dark pill         | Platform sidebar tabs       |
| **Personality**      | High — personal photos     | Low — work-first            |

---

## ✅ Final Recommendation for Your Portfolio

Since you said **Vishesh's style matches your color**, here is your complete recipe:

1. **Background:** `#EDE8E3` warm cream
2. **Accent:** `#E05C2A` orange-red (for italic words, buttons, highlights)
3. **Text:** `#1A1A1A` near-black
4. **Fonts:** `Playfair Display` (headlines) + `Inter` (body)
5. **Navbar:** Dark floating pill, centered, fixed position
6. **Hero:** Huge serif headline, one italic word in orange-red
7. **Photo cluster:** 3 rotated photos with pill badges
8. **Projects:** Large image cards with hover scale effect
9. **Vibe:** Warm, editorial, personality-forward
